meaning: <意>[复]n.烧炭党(19世纪意大利的革命组织,旨在统一意大利,建立共和国) ;烧炭党人
examples: Carbonari came into a five-man defence while 17-year-old striker Izale McLeod was handed his senior debut.
Horacio Carbonari sent Ipswich plunging to 21st place in the First Division with a close-range winner on the stroke of half-time.
